data.title: Solana Proposal May Cut $SOL Inflation by 80%
data.description:
Solana’s community is considering a proposal that could potentially reduce inflation by 80%. The governance proposal, known as SIMD-0228, will usher in a new model that rewards users with greater participation levels.  Authored by Multicoin Capital partners Tushar Jain and Vishal Kankani, the proposal received significant support from Anza’s lead economist, Max Resnick. The idea, […]
The post...
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/solana-proposal-may-cut-sol-inflation-by-80/

data.title: Anti-crypto SEC Commissioner: SEC Guidance on Meme Coins Does Not Provide Clear Legal Definition
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to the guidance issued by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Meme Coin, namely "Determining that Meme Coin is not a security", SEC Commissioner and crypto skeptic Caroline Crenshaw posted on the SEC's official website that the purpose of SEC staff providing written guidance is to promote understanding and compliance with federal securities laws, and the guidance issued by the SEC completely subverts this concept. It presents an incomplete and unfounded legal view that the entire product category is not under the jurisdiction of the SEC; this guidance does not provide a clear legal definition or even a basic dictionary. This guidance is not a reasonable interpretation of existing laws. It raises more questions than it answers, namely, what is Meme Coin and whether Meme Coin is a definable or useful classification in existing securities laws. It boils down to a broad statement of general principles that provides little clarity or predictability for any given currency.

data.title: Santiment: Social media mentions of “buying the dip” skyrockets, yet no one seems to be buying
data.description:
Santiment analytics platform revealed that social media mentions of crypto dip buying had rocketed to their highest level since last July amid recent market downturn. The platform also argued that the surge in social media mentions of crypto didn’t necessarily mean it’s time to buy digital assets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/santiment-mentions-buying-the-dip/

data.title: The trading unit of CME SOL futures contract is 500 SOL, and the micro contract is 25 SOL.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CME announced today that it plans to launch Solana (SOL) futures on March 17, which will be settled in cash and based on the CME CF Solana USD Reference Rate, which serves as the daily reference rate for the SOL USD price and is calculated every day at 4:00 pm London time. It is reported that the micro contract transaction unit is 25 SOL and the large contract is 500 SOL. It is reported that the relevant listing still needs to wait for the review of the regulatory authorities. (prnewswire)

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin’s recent pullback is partly due to lack of positive catalysts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase analysts said that Bitcoin's recent price correction is partly due to the lack of positive catalysts to boost investment confidence. Analysts emphasized. Weak macro sentiment in the United States has exacerbated concerns about an economic slowdown and put pressure on risky assets including cryptocurrencies. Institutional fund flows reflect cautious market sentiment. In the past week, more than $2.9 billion has been withdrawn from U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs. At the same time, as leverage ratios fell and financing rates fell across the board, the lending market also echoed risk aversion. (The Block)

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has blown up more than 75 million US dollars, mainly short orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past 4 hours, the entire network had a liquidation of 75.7034 million US dollars, of which short positions had a liquidation of 59.3263 million US dollars and long positions had a liquidation of 16.3771 million US dollars.
